api_version.description: Default Gemini Data Agents API version for all agents unless overridden per agent.

name.description: MCP server name reported to clients.

log_level.description: Log level for stderr operational logs.

transport.description: MCP transport: stdio (local subprocess) or http (Streamable HTTP).

host.description: HTTP bind host. Defaults to 127.0.0.1 locally; use 0.0.0.0 to bind all interfaces.

port.description: HTTP port. Defaults to process.env.PORT or 8080 when transport is http.

path.description: HTTP path for the MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint.

enabled.description: Require OAuth Bearer tokens on HTTP MCP requests.

resource_url.description: Canonical MCP resource URL (OAuth audience / RFC 8707 resource).

issuer.description: OAuth/OIDC issuer URL (Identity Platform, Keycloak, etc.).

scopes_supported.description: Scopes advertised in Protected Resource Metadata.

oauth.description: OAuth resource-server settings for HTTP transport.

server.description: Optional MCP server identity and logging settings.

data_agent.description: Full Gemini Data Agent resource name.

tools.description: MCP tool names enabled for this agent: query_data_agent, chat_data_agent, create_data_agent_conversation, list_conversation_messages.

impersonate_service_account.description: Optional service account email to impersonate. Omit to use Application Default Credentials (ADC).

api_version.description: Optional per-agent API version override. Defaults to root api_version.

project.description: GCP project used for API client routing when it differs from the data_agent resource.

location.description: GCP location used for API client routing when it differs from the data_agent resource.

client.description: Optional API client project/location when routing differs from the data_agent resource.

display_name.description: Human-readable agent label for MCP resources.

description.description: Short description of the agent purpose.

generation_options.description: Default Gemini Data Agents generation options for query_data_agent.

agents.description: Registry of named data agents keyed by local alias (used in MCP tool agent parameter).

title: Gemini Data Agent MCP Config (v2)
description: User-facing YAML configuration for gemini-data-analyst-mcp and gemini-data-agent-admin-mcp.
